allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings' | Select-Object ProxyServer, ProxyEnable, AutoConfigURL | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match '\\''clash|v2ray|nekoray|hiddify|verge|mihomo|sing'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '\\''clash|mihomo|tun|sing'\\'' } | Select-Object Name, Status, InterfaceDescription | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem Cert:\\LocalMachine\\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -match '\\''clash|mihomo|mitmproxy|root'\\'' } | Select-Object Subject, Thumbprint')
Bash(unset HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY ALL_PROXY http_proxy https_proxy)
